Rashmi,




Glad to hear your feeling better. We look forward to helping you with your financial and tax needs.




Scott

messages.body:
Rashmi,




It was a pleasure speaking with you today. As discussed, I've attached information about Paradigm Capital Group along with the
documents needed to begin the process.

About Paradigm Capital Group
At Paradigm Capital Group, our mission is to help individuals, families, and businesses build enduring financial strategies with
confidence and clarity. Our team offers integrated expertise across life insurance, annuities, securities, tax, and estate
planning through the following firms:

Paradigm Capital Group – Tax, life, and annuity solutions
Desert Rose Capital (Securities Division, CRD# 154331)
Integrated Trust Services – Estate planning support for wills and trusts


Your Primary Contacts

Kenneth E. Ring Jr., CPA
Licenses: FL Annuity & Life (W961704), FL CPA (AC60363), NPN #20652672
Background: Retired U.S. Army Colonel; West Point graduate (BS, 1986); combat deployments in Bosnia (2004) and Afghanistan (2010)
Professional expertise: CPA, Certified Defense Financial Manager, former Senior Manager at Ernst & Young (global taxation)
Personal: Father of two and grandfather of one


Scott Whatley
Licenses: FL Annuity & Life (W369199), NPN #18193334
Focus: Client guidance in annuity, life insurance, and retirement solutions


Uploading Your Paperwork
Once completed, please upload your documents using this secure Dropbox link:

messages.subject: Secure link and PCG credentials

messages.body:
Hello,I was a bit under the weather. 
I am feeling much better now & will upload the documents today evening or tomorrow morning. 
Wanted to keep you in the loop. 
Regards,
Rashmi Sent from my iPhone 16 ProMax

On Jun 10, 2026, at 9:37 AM, Scott Whatley <swhatley@paradigmcapitalfl.com> wrote:

﻿Rashmi,

It was a pleasure speaking with you today. As discussed, I've attached information about Paradigm Capital Group along with the documents needed to begin the process.

About Paradigm Capital Group
At Paradigm Capital Group, our mission is to help individuals, families, and businesses build enduring financial strategies with confidence and clarity. Our team offers integrated expertise across life insurance, annuities, securities, tax, and estate planning through the following firms:

Paradigm Capital Group – Tax, life, and annuity solutions
Desert Rose Capital (Securities Division, CRD# 154331)
Integrated Trust Services – Estate planning support for wills and trusts

Your Primary Contacts
Kenneth E. Ring Jr., CPA
Licenses: FL Annuity & Life (W961704), FL CPA (AC60363), NPN #20652672
Background: Retired U.S. Army Colonel; West Point graduate (BS, 1986); combat deployments in Bosnia (2004) and Afghanistan (2010)
Professional expertise: CPA, Certified Defense Financial Manager, former Senior Manager at Ernst & Young (global taxation)
Personal: Father of two and grandfather of one

Scott Whatley
Licenses: FL Annuity & Life (W369199), NPN #18193334
Focus: Client guidance in annuity, life insurance, and retirement solutions

Uploading Your Paperwork
Once completed, please upload your documents using this secure Dropbox link:

https://www.dropbox.com/request/05xk78f37jf50oy0shsd

I will schedule a follow up appointment once Ken and I have received your documents and created your present financial position. Let me know if you have any questions.

Scott Whatley
Retirement Planning Specialist
Direct: 727-278-3645
Business Cell: 727-278-3645
swhatley@paradigmcapitalfl.com
https://app.usemotion.com/meet/swhatley/meeting

www.paradigmcapitalfl.com

Book an Appointment at: pcgappointments.com
Complete Your Confidential Questionnaire; pcgsecurelink.com

<PCG Client_Bill_of_Rights v12-08-2024.docx>
<PCG Firm Commitments - Generic 12-08-2024.docx>

messages.body:
Hi Rashmi,

Quick reminder for your call tomorrow at Wednesday, June 10, 2026 8:30 AM.

You originally booked this to go over your Roth conversion and how to reduce the tax impact before making a move.

A lot of people miss this strategy and wind up overpaying.

We'll make sure you have clarity before that.

Join here:
https://meet.google.com/dsp-embh-wfe

Talk soon,
Scott

messages.body:
Dear Rashmi,

This is the call you booked to go over your Roth conversion and how to structure it in a more tax-efficient way before making any
